sample_provenance.batch_lot: Wu et al. 1987 polycrystalline pellet — solid-state reaction of Y2O3+BaCO3+CuO

provenance.source_citation: M. K. Wu, J. R. Ashburn, C. J. Torng, P. H. Hor, R. L. Meng, L. Gao, Z. J. Huang, Y. Q. Wang, C. W. Chu, 'Superconductivity at 93 K in a New Mixed-Phase Y-Ba-Cu-O Compound System at Ambient Pressure', Physical Review Letters 58, 908 (1987).

scope_caveats: Digitized from published R(T) figure (Wu et al. PRL 58, 908, 1987 Fig. 2 family); values ±5%.
Original sample was multi-phase polycrystalline Y-Ba-Cu-O; the 93 K transition is attributed to the YBa2Cu3O7-delta phase (refined in subsequent single-crystal work).
R_over_R_300K dimensionless ratio used because the absolute resistance varies with bar geometry across reproductions; ratio is the figure-canonical quantity.
Order-of-magnitude estimates; not lot-tested. Reproduction across labs has been extensive (replication_count reflects literature reproduction, not within-sample repeats).
Tc value 92 K is the midpoint of the resistive transition reported in the original paper (onset ~93 K, zero ~91 K).
citations: RTSC.md §8.2 (HTS Cuprate family) + §8.4 (R(T) drop falsifier row)
Tinkham, 'Introduction to Superconductivity', 2nd ed., McGraw-Hill (1996) — YBCO Tc reproduction discussion (Ch. 9)
